info.english_meaning: to make noiseto be angry to tie to bind to go
info.hindI_arTa: Sabda karanA kroDa karanA baMDanA jAnA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: tAlavyozmAntaH  ' Sabdane rozakriyAyAYcArTe ' iti kzIrasvAmI  ' SabdakopayoH iti drumoktyA rozakftam = roza eva ' iti DAtukAvyavyAKyA  (1.90)
